name: BotCommandScopeChatMember
description: Represents the scope of bot commands, covering a specific member of a group or supergroup chat.

fields.name: chat_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format @username. Channel direct messages chats and channel chats aren't supported.

fields.name: user_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the target user
